cases.name: happy: swap 0.1 WSOL → USDC
cases.description: Reset, seed, init pool, swap. Tx succeeds, USDC balance grows, CU < 200k.

cases.name: happy: swap 15 USDC → WSOL
cases.description: Mirror of the above in the opposite direction.

cases.name: swap WSOL → USDC larger than balance must fail
cases.description: Asking the pool for more WSOL than the payer holds must abort the tx.

cases.name: unhappy: slippage too tight (min_out = u64::MAX)
cases.description: Same swap but min_amount_out set absurdly high. Expect tx to fail.
